description_long: This is a spacious two-story suburban house with a mix of stone and brick exterior walls, featuring a red-tiled gable roof. The front yard is enclosed by a wooden picket fence and includes a driveway leading to a double garage, a carport, and a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs. Large arched and rectangular windows provide ample natural light, while the rear of the house opens to a patio area with an outdoor dining table, sun loungers, and a swimming pool. The backyard is paved and includes a poolside relaxation area, as well as a covered outdoor seating structure. The house has a prominent main entrance with double doors and a decorative window above, and the upper floor is partially open, revealing interior rooms and a staircase. The overall design blends traditional and modern suburban elements, making it suitable for a family residence in an urban neighborhood.
description: A large two-story suburban house with stone and brick walls, red-tiled gable roof, fenced front yard, double garage, and a backyard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, carport, landscaped garden, and picket fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, carport, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard patio and pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor dining area, sun loungers, and swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the covered outdoor seating area, garden, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with a decorative arched window above, small steps, and a landscaped approach framed by a picket fence.
